ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., regression, classification, clustering) */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Framework used for the model (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., in development, deployed, deprecated) */,
  "last_trained_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last trained */,
  "last_evaluated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last evaluated */,
  "training_time" INTEGER /* Duration of the last training session */,
  "evaluation_time" INTEGER /* Duration of the last evaluation session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the metrics belong to */,
  "explained_variance" REAL /* Explained variance score */,
  "r2_score" REAL /* R-squared (Coefficient of Determination) score */,
  "max_error" REAL /* Maximum error */,
  "mean_absolute_error" REAL /* Mean absolute error */,
  "mean_squared_error" REAL /* Mean squared error */,
  "mean_absolute_percentage_error" REAL /* Mean absolute percentage error */,
  "median_absolute_error" REAL /* Median absolute error */,
  "training_dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training dataset */,
  "evaluation_dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation dataset */,
  "training_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training process */,
  "evaluation_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the evaluation process */,
  "num_samples" INTEGER /* Number of samples used for evaluation */,
  "cross_val_score" REAL /* Cross-validation score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version the hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "hyperparam_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "hyperparam_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "hyperparam_type" TEXT /* Type of the hyperparameter (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  "hyperparam_description" TEXT /* Description of the hyperparameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hyperparameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hyperparameter was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the hyperparameter */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the user is part of */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the model version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model version (e.g., in development, deployed, deprecated) */,
  "training_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training process */,
  "evaluation_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the evaluation process */,
  "num_samples" INTEGER /* Number of samples used for evaluation */,
  "cross_val_score" REAL /* Cross-validation score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_architectures" (
  "architecture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model architecture entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version */,
  "architecture_json" TEXT /* JSON representation of the model architecture */,
  "architecture_description" TEXT /* Description of the model architecture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the architecture was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the architecture was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the architecture */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the architecture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("architecture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_architectures_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_architectures_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON, Parquet) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  "size_in_bytes" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "num_samples" INTEGER /* Number of samples in the dataset */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last modified */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Whether the dataset is public or private */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the dataset is distributed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_datasets" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "association_type" TEXT /* Type of association (e.g., training, evaluation) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the association */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Whether the association is the current one for the model version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_datasets_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_datasets_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_datasets_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions_performance" (
  "version_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry for a model version */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version */,
  "explained_variance" REAL /* Explained variance score */,
  "r2_score" REAL /* R-squared (Coefficient of Determination) score */,
  "max_error" REAL /* Maximum error */,
  "mean_absolute_error" REAL /* Mean absolute error */,
  "mean_squared_error" REAL /* Mean squared error */,
  "mean_absolute_percentage_error" REAL /* Mean absolute percentage error */,
  "median_absolute_error" REAL /* Median absolute error */,
  "training_dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training dataset */,
  "evaluation_dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation dataset */,
  "training_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training process */,
  "evaluation_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the evaluation process */,
  "num_samples" INTEGER /* Number of samples used for evaluation */,
  "cross_val_score" REAL /* Cross-validation score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_performance_training_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_performance_evaluation_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_performance_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model or dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the model or dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used for access */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Whether the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
